[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 9/9 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Student: 3★ Aru (Dress), 3★ Kayoko (Dress)
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule:
9/9 (Tue) After Maintenance – 9/16 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
